info.description: Backend API for Mi-Tech GST Invoice Manager.
info.title: Mi-Tech API

post.description: Authenticate a user and return a JWT token. If 2FA is enabled, it returns requires_2fa=true.

get.description: Internal endpoint for Nginx to validate the Bearer token and retrieve user metadata.

post.description: Complete the login process by verifying the 6-digit OTP.

get.description: Retrieve all messages for a specific conversation.
Retrieve all active customer chat conversations.

put.description: Switch between 'auto' (bot) and 'human' (agent) mode for a chat thread.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all customer ratings and messages
Retrieve a paginated list of all sent and received WhatsApp messages.
Retrieve all automation messages sent for a specific order.
Aggregate delivery, read, and failure rates for automated messages.

post.description: Fetch delivery and read analytics directly from Meta's Insight API.
Dispatch a template message to multiple customers simultaneously.
Trigger a specific template message for a given order manually.
Send a non-template, free-text message to a customer (Human-to-Human).

get.description: Retrieve all imported WhatsApp templates with optional date filtering.

put.description: Update the variable mappings for a WhatsApp template.

post.description: Import a new template from Meta or create a custom one.

delete.description: Remove a template from the local database.

post.description: Fetch latest approval statuses for all templates from Meta.
Wipe and re-import all templates from the linked Meta WABA.
Upload an image or PDF to Meta's servers for use in template headers.

get.description: Retrieve all configured Webhook-to-Template mappings.

put.description: Enable or disable a specific Webhook-to-Template trigger.

post.description: Link a Shopify webhook topic to a WhatsApp template.
Endpoint for Meta Cloud API to push delivery receipts and incoming customer messages.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all API keys and secrets. Sensitive values are masked (********).

put.description: Update a specific configuration key (e.g. meta_api_token). Required 'admin' role.

post.description: Retrieve unmasked values of API keys by re-authenticating with the user's password.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with advanced filtering.

post.description: Manually create a new customer profile.

delete.description: Wipe the entire customers table. Required 'admin' role.

post.description: Delete multiple customers by their IDs.

get.description: Export a CSV compatible with Meta Custom Audiences.

post.description: Upload a CSV file and import customer data.

get.description: Fetch all individual ads for a specific Meta Adset, including insights.
Fetch all adsets for a specific Meta Campaign, including insights.
Fetch all campaigns for a specific Meta Ad Account.
High-level summary of active campaigns, ad accounts, and performance insights.
Audit the visibility and linkage of configured Meta Page and Instagram IDs.
Fetch historical engagement metrics and growth insights for FB, IG, or Threads.

post.description: Publish content to FB, IG, or Threads.
Manually trigger a deep sync of metrics and post history.

get.description: Get a paginated list of orders with filters

put.description: Update order details and synchronize improvements back to Shopify.

post.description: Create a new POS order directly in the system. Triggers inventory deduction and external synchronization.

put.description: Set delivery_status = 'delivered' and stamp delivered_at time. Trigger immediate WhatsApp notification.

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific order, including line items.

put.description: Add or update an internal admin comment on a customer feedback

get.description: Generate and download a GST invoice PDF for an order

put.description: Update the financial status of an order manually

get.description: Retrieve a list of all unique platforms from which orders originated (e.g., Shopify, Amazon, POS).

put.description: Update the internal status of an order

get.description: Aggregate revenue, taxable values, and tax splits (CGST/SGST/IGST) for a date range.
Detailed breakdown of taxes and sales grouped by HSN code.
Breakdown of revenue and taxes grouped by customer state.

put.description: Update a specific setting key. Required 'admin' role.

get.description: Retrieve the start and end dates used for filtering dashboard and report data.

post.description: Wipe local orders and re-sync everything from Shopify
Fetch and update orders from Shopify for a specific date range.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available documentation files in the /docs directory.
Fetch the raw Markdown content of a documentation file by its slug.
Redirects the user to the carrier's tracking page based on the order ID.
Retrieve a list of all users. Required 'admin' role.

post.description: Register a new user with a specified role. Required 'admin' role.

get.description: Check the status of the last received webhook and its processing state.

post.description: Secure endpoint for Shopify to push real-time order, fulfillment, and customer updates.
